2024-06-14T12:19:00.CONTENT_EN: The only lane of Yiu Hing Road (westbound) between Yiu Kwai House, Yiu Tung Estate and Yiu Hing House, Yiu Tung Estate which was closed due to inclement weather is re-opened to all traffic. However, the rehabilitation works is still underway, the eastbound traffic lane of the concerned road section remains temporarily closed to all vehicular traffic. Eastbound services of franchised bus and green minibus services are diverted as follow: - Citybus route nos. 77, 99, 720X and N8, Cross Harbour route nos. 110 and 606 and Green Minibus route no. 65, after passing by Yiu Tung Estate Bus Terminus, are diverted via Yiu Hing Road westbound, Wai Hang Street, Tai Lok Street and Shau Kei Wan Road eastbound before resuming their original routeings. Green Minibus route no. 50, after passing by Yiu Tung Estate Bus Terminus, is diverted via Yiu Hing Road westbound, Wai Hang Street and Tai Lok Street before resuming its original routeing. Westbound services of Citybus route nos. 77, 82S, 99 and N8, Cross Harbour route nos. 110 and 606 and Green Minibus route no. 65 have resumed their original routeings via Yiu Hing Road westbound.
2024-06-14T12:19:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因受惡劣天氣影響而封閉的耀興道(西行)介乎耀東邨耀貴樓與耀東邨耀興樓之間的唯一行車線現已解封。 惟因修復工程仍在進行中，該路段東行方向的行車線仍然暫時封閉。 往東行方向的巴士及小巴路線須改道如下: -城巴第77、99、720X及N8號線、過海巴士第110及606號線及專線小巴第65號線在途經耀東邨巴士總站後，須改經耀興道西行、惠亨街、太樂街及筲箕灣道東行，然後返回原有路線。專線小巴第50號線在途經耀東邨巴士總站後，則會改經耀興道西行、惠亨街及太樂街，然後返回原有路線。 往西行方向的城巴第77、82S、99及N8號線、過海巴士第110及606號線及專線小巴第65號，則恢復行經耀興道西行的原有路線。

2024-06-30T17:30:00.CONTENT_EN:
The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points tomorrow (1st July). The Transport Department appeals to these inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. 

It is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the period and the waiting time would increase. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. 

The Transport Department's Emergency Transport Coordination Centre will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport services at all land-based Boundary Control Points, and shall disseminate the latest traffic news through the Transport Department's mobile application "HKeMobility". 
The public may make use of "HKeMobility" to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at the inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Hong Kong Port, and they may also check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the「大橋口岸實時通關」service on the「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」or 「珠海發布」WeChat official accounts (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/),in order to plan their journeys ahead.
2024-06-30T17:30:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署預料明日(7月1日)將有較多跨境旅客使用陸路口岸回港，運輸署呼籲有關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。預計在返港高峰時間的公共運輸需求會較高，乘客候車時間亦會較長。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。運輸署的緊急交通事故協調中心會繼續監察各陸路口岸的公共運輸服務情況，並會透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」，發放最新的交通消息。

市民亦可透過「香港出行易」查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，以及透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況，以便及早計劃行程。

2024-07-02T11:50:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，民寶街(往金鐘方向)近中環３號碼頭的慢線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在民寶街(往金鐘方向)的車龍龍尾已到干諾道西天橋近中區警署。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-07-02T12:04:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Man Po Street (Admiralty bound) near Central Pier No.3 which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-07-02T12:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的民寶街(往金鐘方向)近中環３號碼頭的慢線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。
